rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE HOM FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate Actions (To Cons With Pcn-14-297447, Cgc-15-547664)
rulings.Rulings: Glenn Hom's Motion to Consolidate Actions is denied without prejudice. Glenn Hom has failed to comply with the requirements set forth in CRC, Rule 3.350(a)(1)(C). Further, the Court does not consolidate conservatorship cases with other cases. Any party choosing to contest the tentative must notify the Court and all parties no later than April 20, 2016, at 4:00 p.m.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Or In The Alternative To Reconsider Order Denying Petition For Order Authorizing Settlement Of Will Contest
rulings.Rulings: The motion to set aside the order denying petition for order authorizing settlement of will contest is granted. The court vacates its March 9, 2016 order and enters an order granting the petition. The moving party must submit a proposed order setting forth the grounds for relief identified in his motion. Any party choosing to contest must notify the court and counsel no later than April 20, 2016, at 4:00 p.m.
